name: @geenius-ui/monorepo
description: Geenius UI — Shared component library for React and Solid

scripts.version:patch: pnpm -r exec -- npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm version patch -m 'v%s'
scripts.version:minor: pnpm -r exec -- npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm version minor -m 'v%s'
scripts.version:major: pnpm -r exec -- npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm version major -m 'v%s'
